summary: A globe/map visualization project with a Black, Gold & White theme. Currently working on visual polish: darkening continents to near-black and sharpening/reducing pixelation on the background.
architectural_notes: Black, Gold & White color theme throughout
Background must be sharp and non-pixelated
known_issues: Continents rendering in blue instead of near-black

existing_features.title: In AnimatedWorldMap.tsx, change the continent fill/outline color from blue to near-black (e.g., #0a0a0a or #111111) so continents match the Black, Gold & White theme instead of appearing blue.

Reduce pixelation and blurriness on the hero background in Home.tsx and any related background image or canvas rendering. Ensure the background appears sharp and crisp — use higher-resolution rendering, avoid CSS scaling artifacts, and set image-rendering to crisp or pixelated where appropriate.

projectName: Darken continents to near-black and sharpen background
